name: Alpha's Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, dissolve sugar in evaporated milk.
2. Add butter (cut into pieces) and corn syrup, and stir constantly until the butter is melted.
3. Continue cooking over low heat, stirring frequently, until you reach the soft ball stage.
4. Remove from heat and mix in peanut butter.
5. Cool mixture to about 120 degrees F.
6. Mix in vanilla extract.
7. Spread the fudge into a suitable-sized pan (a larger pan will result in thinner pieces; an 8x8 pan is recommended).
8. The fudge will remain soft at this stage and will take several hours to set completely.
